hibernate-mapping.query: select comp.SourceCompanyId, comp.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where comp.id in ( select distinct c.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as e, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementCode as ec, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs where c.id = eu.Company.id and e.id = eu.Entitlement.id and e.EntitlementCode.id = ec.id and c.id = cs.Company.id and e.EntitlementState = 'Enabled' and eu.EntitlementUnitStatus in ('Activated', 'PendingActivation', 'PendingReactivation') and c.SourceSystemCd = 'QBDT' and cs.Service.ServiceCd in ('Tax','ViewMyPaycheck') and ((c.PublishStatus is null and '0' = :companyPublishState) or (SUBSTR(c.PublishStatus,:fieldIndex+1, 1) = :companyPublishState)) and c.IAMRealmId is not null ) order by comp.SourceCompanyId desc

select comp.SourceCompanyId, comp.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where comp.id in ( select distinct c.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as e, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementCode as ec where c.id = eu.Company.id and e.id = eu.Entitlement.id and e.EntitlementCode.id = ec.id and e.EntitlementState = 'Enabled' and eu.EntitlementUnitStatus in ('Activated', 'PendingActivation', 'PendingReactivation') and c.SourceSystemCd = 'QBDT' and ((c.PublishStatus is null and '0' = :companyPublishState) or (SUBSTR(c.PublishStatus,:fieldIndex+1, 1) = :companyPublishState)) ) order by comp.SourceCompanyId desc

select comp.SourceCompanyId, comp.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where comp.id in ( select distinct c.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as e, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementCode as ec where c.id = eu.Company.id and e.id = eu.Entitlement.id and e.EntitlementCode.id = ec.id and e.EntitlementState = 'Enabled' and eu.EntitlementUnitStatus in ('Activated', 'PendingActivation', 'PendingReactivation') and c.SourceSystemCd = 'QBDT' and c.IAMRealmId is not null and ((c.PublishStatus is null and '0' = :companyPublishState) or (SUBSTR(c.PublishStatus,:fieldIndex+1, 1) = :companyPublishState)) ) order by comp.SourceCompanyId desc

select comp.SourceCompanyId, comp.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where comp.id in ( select distinct c.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as e, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementCode as ec where c.id = eu.Company.id and e.id = eu.Entitlement.id and e.EntitlementCode.id = ec.id and (e.EntitlementState = 'Disabled' or eu.EntitlementUnitStatus in ('ActivationHold','DeactivationHold','Deactivated', 'PendingDeactivation','ErrorDeactivating','ErrorActivating')) and c.SourceSystemCd = 'QBDT' and c.IAMRealmId is not null and (e.ModifiedDate > add_months( trunc(sysdate), -12*7 ) or eu.ModifiedDate > add_months( trunc(sysdate), -12*7 ) ) and ((c.PublishStatus is null and '0' = :companyPublishState) or (SUBSTR(c.PublishStatus,:fieldIndex+1, 1) = :companyPublishState)) ) order by comp.SourceCompanyId desc

select comp.SourceCompanyId, comp.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where comp.id in ( select distinct c.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as c, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as e, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementCode as ec where c.id = eu.Company.id and e.id = eu.Entitlement.id and e.EntitlementCode.id = ec.id and (e.EntitlementState = 'Disabled' or eu.EntitlementUnitStatus in ('ActivationHold','DeactivationHold','Deactivated', 'PendingDeactivation','ErrorDeactivating','ErrorActivating')) and c.SourceSystemCd = 'QBDT' and c.IAMRealmId is not null and (e.ModifiedDate > date_trunc('day',current_timestamp at time zone 'PST') - interval '84 months' or eu.ModifiedDate > date_trunc('day',current_timestamp at time zone 'PST') - interval '84 months' ) and ((c.PublishStatus is null and '0' = :companyPublishState) or (SUBSTR(c.PublishStatus,:fieldIndex+1, 1) = :companyPublishState)) ) order by comp.SourceCompanyId desc
